product_overview: Plantify is a web-based AI-powered plant identification and diagnosis application that allows users to capture or upload plant images to receive detailed identification, health assessment, and care recommendations. The app integrates an intuitive user experience with camera access, AI analysis, collection management, and community features, all backed by a robust Supabase backend.
core_goals: Enable users to quickly and accurately identify plants using AI-powered image analysis.
Provide plant health diagnosis with treatment recommendations to support plant care.
Allow users to manage a personalized collection of identified plants.
Offer seamless and secure user authentication and session management.
Deliver a smooth and engaging UI/UX with responsive design and dark mode support.
Support social and community interactions through feeds and AI assistant features.
Maintain high reliability with offline handling and error resilience.
key_features: Authentication & User Profile management with sign-in, session persistence, and profile display.
Home View with easy entry points for scanning plants and accessing plant doctor diagnosis.
Camera Capture and Upload functionality for capturing plant images or uploading from device.
AI Plant Identification and Diagnosis powered by Gemini API with image compression and analysis.
Real-time Analyzing and Loading states with informative progress animations.
Plant Result & Diagnosis View showing detailed identification, health status, care instructions, similar plants, and sharing options.
Collection Management for saving, viewing, and deleting plants with Supabase persistence.
Scan History & Explore View to review past scans and detailed plant results.
Community Feed and AI Assistant views for social interaction and expert assistance.
Profile & Settings including collection stats and dark mode toggle.
Bottom Navigation Bar with routing between Home, Explore, Community, Assistant, and Profile screens.
Placeholder AR View along with Tools, Guides, and Consultations shells for extended functionality.
user_flow_summary: User signs up or signs in through secure authentication, maintaining session across visits.
From the Home View, user can initiate plant scan or diagnosis using camera or upload.
Captured images are sent to AI service for identification or diagnosis, showing an analyzing/loading screen.
System displays plant identification results with details and care recommendations or health diagnosis and treatments.
User can save identified plants to personal collection, browse collection, and manage entries.
Navigation bar allows moving between Home, Explore (scan history), Community feed, AI Assistant, and Profile views.
Profile view provides user data, collection stats, and settings like dark mode toggle.
Community and Assistant views provide social feeds and AI-powered plant help.
Offline mode informs users and disables camera/upload features while allowing cached data access.
validation_criteria: User authentication processes must work reliably including sign-in, sign-up, sign-out, and protected routes.
Home page elements and navigation controls are visible and functional.
Camera access and image upload operate correctly for both identification and diagnosis modes.
AI plant identification and diagnosis return accurate results and error states are handled gracefully.
Plant collection can be created, updated, viewed, and deleted with backend synchronization.
Navigation bar correctly highlights active views and routes between screens without errors.
User profile information and settings including dark mode toggle function as intended.
Application is responsive across device types and screen sizes with appropriate loading and error states.
Offline scenarios properly notify users, disable restricted functions, and allow viewing cached data.
UI elements load images properly, handle errors gracefully, and maintain consistent styling including dark mode.

features.name: Authentication & User Profile
features.description: User sign-in, session handling, profile display, and Supabase-backed user data.

features.name: Home View & Entry Points
features.description: Landing experience with scan entry points, plant doctor shortcut, weekly stats, and recent scans carousel.

features.name: Camera Capture & Upload
features.description: Camera access, capture flow, gallery upload, and diagnostic/identify mode handling.

features.name: AI Plant Identification
features.description: Gemini-based plant identification and diagnosis including image compression and API integration.

features.name: Analyzing & Loading Experience
features.description: Full-screen analyzing state with rotating loading messages and animated progress for scans.

features.name: Plant Result & Diagnosis View
features.description: Rich result screen with identification details, health assessment, care info, similar plants, share and report actions.

features.name: Collection Management
features.description: Save, list, and view plant collection items backed by Supabase tables.

features.name: Scan History & Explore View
features.description: Display scan history and allow navigation into detailed plant results.

features.name: Community & Assistant Views
features.description: Community feed shell and AI assistant experience for plant-related help.

features.name: Profile & Settings
features.description: User profile display, collection stats, and dark mode toggle.

features.name: Navigation Layout
features.description: Bottom navigation bar and high-level routing between primary views.

features.name: AR & Tools & Guides Shell
features.description: Placeholder AR view and utility views for tools, guides, and consultations.
